regex: ^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)': No matching global declaration available for the validation root\.$
fix_advice_template: Check the root element name and XML namespace on {element} so they match the schema.

regex: ^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)': Missing child element\(s\)\. Expected is(?P<one_of> one of)? \( (?P<expected_text>[^)]+) \)\.$
^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)': The attribute '(?P<attribute>[^']+)' is required but missing\.$
^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)', attribute '(?P<attribute>[^']+)': The attribute '(?:[^']+)' is not allowed\.$
^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)', attribute '(?P<attribute>[^']+)': '(?P<invalid_value>[^']+)' is not a valid value of the (?:union )?type '(?P<type_name>[^']+)'\.$
fix_advice_template: Change '{attribute}' on {element} from '{invalid_value}' to a value allowed by {type_name}.

regex: ^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)': This element is not expected\. Expected is(?: one of)? \( (?P<expected_text>[^)]+) \)\.$
fix_advice_template: Move {element} after the required earlier child element(s): {expected_text}.

regex: ^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)': This element is not expected\. Expected is(?: one of)? \( (?P<expected_text>[^)]+) \)\.$
fix_advice_template: Replace, move, or remove {element}. The schema expected {expected_text} at this location.
